2026-05-13PMOPublic Service Employment ActAppointment of a member of the Independent Advisory Board for Supreme Court of Canada Judicial AppointmentsAppointment of the Honourable J. Michael MacDonald, of Halifax, Nova Scotia, to be a special adviser to the Prime Minister, to serve as a member of the Independent Advisory Board for Supreme Court of Canada Judicial Appointments, to hold office during pleasure for a term of one year.N/A
subject: Appointment of a member of the Independent Advisory Board for Supreme Court of Canada Judicial Appointments
precis: Appointment of the Honourable J. Michael MacDonald, of Halifax, Nova Scotia, to be a special adviser to the Prime Minister, to serve as a member of the Independent Advisory Board for Supreme Court of Canada Judicial Appointments, to hold office during pleasure for a term of one year.
